name: TicketIssue Audit Linking

scanner_truth: mobile sync exports active or nil scan_eligibility attendees
Tickera reconciliation writes AttendeeInvalidationEvent rows and bumps event_sync_version

required_indexes: unique(attendee_id) where attendee_id is not null
index(delivery_token_hash) if secure ticket page lookup uses this table
in_scope: Create/reuse TicketIssue rows after VS-09B attendee bridge
Store hashes for QR and delivery tokens
Transition order to ticket_issued only after all expected issue rows exist
Handle partial issue mismatch with partially_issued/manual_review per VS-09A

red: paid_verified order creates one TicketIssue per issuance unit
TicketIssue links order, order line, sequence, attendee_id, and ticket_code
duplicate issue_order calls do not duplicate TicketIssues
concurrent duplicate workers do not duplicate TicketIssues
retry after partial failure creates only missing issues
conflicting existing TicketIssue moves to manual_review
plaintext tokens are absent from DB and logs
green: token hashes stored using VS-08 helpers
order ticket_issued only after complete issue set
existing scanner/reconciliation/mobile sync tests remain green

performance_scaling.hot: Existing Attendee scanner/cache path remains unchanged.
performance_scaling.warm: No new warm cache required in this slice.
performance_scaling.cold: TicketIssue rows are durable Postgres audit/link truth.
performance_scaling.concurrency: Use order/advisory lock plus DB unique constraints; do not rely on Oban uniqueness only.
performance_scaling.redis: No Redis inventory mutation in this slice.
performance_scaling.pubsub: No PubSub required except existing approved hook if present; VS-10 owns sync aggregation.

notes: Do not put delivery token plaintext in StateTransition metadata.
Do not expose attendee_id as customer-facing reference.

next_slice: VS-09D — Issuance Retry and Partial Failure Tests
